name: VidPipe - 热点→视频→抖音/小红书

parameters.code:
import httpx, os, json

selected = $json['selected']
keyword  = selected['keyword']
heat     = selected['heat']

LLM_BASE_URL = os.environ.get('LLM_BASE_URL', 'http://host.docker.internal:11434/v1')
LLM_API_KEY  = os.environ.get('LLM_API_KEY', 'ollama')
LLM_MODEL    = os.environ.get('LLM_MODEL', 'qwen2.5:14b')

system_prompt = '''你是一个专业的短视频文案创作者，擅长为抖音和小红书创作爆款内容。
输出 JSON 格式，包含:
- title: 视频标题（15字内，含emoji，吸引眼球）
- caption: 视频正文（100-150字，口语化，有亮点，结尾有互动引导）
- tags: 话题标签列表（8-12个，含热门话题和细分标签）
- video_prompt: 给视频生成AI的英文提示词（描述视觉画面，竖版9:16，写实风格）
- image_prompt: 封面图提示词（英文，竖版，高对比度）'''

user_prompt = f'热搜话题：{keyword}\n热度值：{heat}\n请为这个话题创作一套完整的短视频内容方案。'

headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {LLM_API_KEY}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
payload = {'model': LLM_MODEL, 'messages': [{'role': 'system', 'content': system_prompt}, {'role': 'user', 'content': user_prompt}], 'temperature': 0.8, 'response_format': {'type': 'json_object'}}

r = httpx.post(f'{LLM_BASE_URL}/chat/completions', json=payload, headers=headers, timeout=60)
r.raise_for_status()
copy = json.loads(r.json()['choices'][0]['message']['content'])

return [{'json': {'keyword': keyword, 'title': copy.get('title', f'关于{keyword}你不知道的事'), 'caption': copy.get('caption', ''), 'tags': copy.get('tags', [keyword]), 'video_prompt': copy.get('video_prompt', f'cinematic short video about {keyword}, vertical 9:16'), 'image_prompt': copy.get('image_prompt', f'social media cover for {keyword}'), 'selected': selected}}]

import httpx, os, json, time, uuid
from pathlib import Path

COMFYUI_URL = os.environ.get('COMFYUI_URL', 'http://host.docker.internal:8188')
VIDEO_DIR   = os.environ.get('SAU_VIDEO_DIR', '/data/videos')
Path(VIDEO_DIR).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

video_prompt = $json['video_prompt']
title        = $json['title']
client_id    = str(uuid.uuid4())

# 替换为你实际使用的 ComfyUI workflow JSON
COMFY_WORKFLOW = {
    '3': {'class_type': 'KSampler', 'inputs': {'cfg': 7, 'denoise': 1, 'latent_image': ['5', 0], 'model': ['4', 0], 'negative': ['7', 0], 'positive': ['6', 0], 'sampler_name': 'euler', 'scheduler': 'normal', 'seed': 42, 'steps': 20}},
    '4': {'class_type': 'CheckpointLoaderSimple', 'inputs': {'ckpt_name': 'v1-5-pruned-emaonly.ckpt'}},
    '5': {'class_type': 'EmptyLatentImage', 'inputs': {'batch_size': 1, 'height': 1216, 'width': 832}},
    '6': {'class_type': 'CLIPTextEncode', 'inputs': {'clip': ['4', 1], 'text': video_prompt}},
    '7': {'class_type': 'CLIPTextEncode', 'inputs': {'clip': ['4', 1], 'text': 'ugly, blurry, nsfw, watermark'}},
    '8': {'class_type': 'VAEDecode', 'inputs': {'samples': ['3', 0], 'vae': ['4', 2]}},
    '9': {'class_type': 'SaveImage', 'inputs': {'filename_prefix': 'vidpipe', 'images': ['8', 0]}}
}

r = httpx.post(f'{COMFYUI_URL}/prompt', json={'prompt': COMFY_WORKFLOW, 'client_id': client_id}, timeout=30)
r.raise_for_status()
prompt_id = r.json()['prompt_id']

output_file = None
for _ in range(60):
    time.sleep(5)
    history = httpx.get(f'{COMFYUI_URL}/history/{prompt_id}', timeout=10).json()
    if prompt_id in history:
        outputs = history[prompt_id].get('outputs', {})
        for node_id, node_output in outputs.items():
            if 'images' in node_output:
                img_info = node_output['images'][0]
                img_resp = httpx.get(f'{COMFYUI_URL}/view', params={'filename': img_info['filename'], 'subfolder': img_info.get('subfolder', ''), 'type': 'output'}, timeout=30)
                safe_title = ''.join(c for c in title if c.isalnum() or c in '_ ')[:30]
                output_file = f'{VIDEO_DIR}/{safe_title}_{prompt_id[:8]}.png'
                with open(output_file, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(img_resp.content)
                break
        if output_file:
            break

if not output_file:
    raise Exception('ComfyUI 生成超时或失败')

return [{'json': {**$json, 'video_path': output_file, 'prompt_id': prompt_id}}]

import httpx, os

SAU_API_URL = os.environ.get('SAU_API_URL', 'http://sau-backend:8080')
payload = {'video_path': $json['video_path'], 'title': $json['title'], 'caption': $json['caption'], 'tags': $json['tags'], 'publish_type': 0}
r = httpx.post(f'{SAU_API_URL}/upload/douyin', json=payload, timeout=300)
r.raise_for_status()
return [{'json': {'douyin_result': r.json(), **$json}}]

import httpx, os

SAU_API_URL = os.environ.get('SAU_API_URL', 'http://sau-backend:8080')
payload = {'video_path': $json['video_path'], 'title': $json['title'], 'caption': $json['caption'], 'tags': $json['tags'], 'publish_type': 0}
r = httpx.post(f'{SAU_API_URL}/upload/xhs', json=payload, timeout=300)
r.raise_for_status()
return [{'json': {'xhs_result': r.json(), **$json}}]
